'''Niian''' was a tropical [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="BF" /> of the [[Niian system/Legends|Niian system]], located within the [[Thaere sector/Legends|Thaere sector]], in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="EAOC" /> In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Dannen Lifehold]] was on the planet doing an errand for his mentor, another smuggler named [[Twolz]]. While Lifehold was on the errand, Twolz and his crew were [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], the elite [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="BF" />

==Behind the scenes==
Niian's was mentioned in the short story "[[Breaking Free: The Adventures of Dannen Lifehold]]," written by [[Dave Marron]] and published in [[February]] [[1994]] within the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|first issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''.<ref name="BF" /> The [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]] placed the Niian [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Niian, in grid square O-14.<ref name="EAOC" />
